title: Tenant boundary precheck
implementation_summary: Adds the RP00.P02.M03.S03 Hermes Validation tenant boundary precheck surface as deterministic metadata-only control-plane policy, service prechecker, validator, fixture, README, contract definition, and contract validator wiring. The slice consumes S02 normalized hermes_validation metadata, rechecks actor/resource/Matter tenant metadata against tenant_id, emits allow_metadata_only for same-tenant context or deny_blocked_claim_required with specific blocked-claim refs for actor/resource/Matter tenant mismatch, carries TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, validation context IDs, acceptance gate IDs, M00 refs, permission_decision_ref, and audit_event_ref, rejects unsafe runtime/Hermes/evidence/bypass claims fail-closed, and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S04 without creating runtime routes, executing service logic, mutating tenant lifecycle state, running Hermes validation, creating Hermes evidence, replacing human approval, using real data, or writing product state.
